name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Horizontal steps
description: Steps section with left-to-right step sequence for process overviews.

name: Vertical timeline
description: Steps section with top-to-bottom timeline structure for staged progress.

name: Icon steps
description: Steps section with step items led by icons for faster recognition.

name: Alternating cards
description: Steps section with alternating side cards to visualize progression stages.

name: Interactive progress steps
description: Steps section with interactive stepper with active and completed states.

name: Primary background
description: Steps section with process section on a high-contrast primary background.
